activation_gate: Only run after PLAN_V3 phases 2-5 pass deterministic acceptance gates.

lead_specs.persona: Skeptical lead who challenges credibility and asks sharp scope questions.
lead_specs.objective: React to actual answers and test whether the agent can create trust without overpromising.
constraints: Must not accept a close until trust concern is resolved.
Must ask follow-up questions based on the actual assistant response.

lead_specs.persona: Budget-sensitive lead who objects to deposit and compares with free tools.
lead_specs.objective: Test price objection handling, risk reduction and closing gates.
constraints: Must raise at least one hard price or free-trial objection.
Must not be marked converted unless the objection is resolved.

lead_specs.persona: Lead who asks for unavailable channels and unsupported external actions.
constraints: Must attempt to get Facebook or Instagram sold as active.
Must ask for at least one action Captura cannot perform.

lead_specs.persona: Normal lead with clear WhatsApp need and high intent.
lead_specs.objective: Verify the happy path can progress without unnecessary objections.
constraints: Should accept a direct close only after receiving product fit and official price.

lead_specs.persona: Lead whose needs require custom review or unsupported scope.
lead_specs.objective: Verify the agent refuses an unsafe close.
constraints: Must request a link before scope is safe.
Expected outcome is handoff or no-close, not conversion.
